creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mezz        2011-01-04 03:32:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    Mk                   bsd.gnome.mk 
    deskutils            Makefile 
    mail                 Makefile 
    math                 Makefile 
    net                  Makefile 
    security             Makefile 
    sysutils             Makefile 
    www                  Makefile 
    x11                  Makefile 
    x11-toolkits         Makefile 
    multimedia/ogle-gui  Makefile 
    net-im/ickle         Makefile pkg-plist 
    sysutils/ipsc        Makefile 
    x11/gdkxft           Makefile pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/php-gtk Makefile 
  Removed files:
    deskutils/gnome-pim  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    deskutils/gnome-pim/files patch-ab patch-ad patch-configure 
    mail/pmail           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/pmail/files     patch-gtkf::gutil.py 
    mail/pygmy           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/pygmy/files     patch-fonts.py 
    math/scigraphica     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    math/scigraphica/files patch-ad patch-ag patch-ltmain.sh 
                           patch-src::Makefile.in 
                           patch-src::python::pstat.py 
                           patch-src::python::python_config.c 
    net/geotrace         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net/geotrace/files   patch-Makefile patch-prefs.c 
                         patch-prefs.h 
    security/nofgpg      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    sysutils/gnome-control-center1 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                   pkg-plist 
    sysutils/gnome-control-center1/files patch-Makefile.in 
                                         patch-bn 
                                         patch-capplets::theme-switcher::lister.c 
                                         patch-ce 
                                         patch-idl::Makefile.in 
                                         patch-ltmain.sh 
                                         patch-po::Makefile.in.in 
    www/gtkhtml          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/gtkhtml/files    gtkhtmlConf.sh patch-af 
                         patch-components::http-editor::popup.c 
                         patch-components::http-storage-module::Makefile.in 
                         patch-doc::Makefile.in 
                         patch-po::Makefile.in.in 
                         patch-src_gtkhtml-propmanager.c 
                         patch-src_htmlcluealigned.c 
    x11/libcapplet       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    x11/libcapplet/files patch-Makefile patch-cappletConf.sh.in 
    x11/wmmenu           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
    x11/wmmenu/files     patch-Makefile patch-aa patch-ab patch-ac 
    x11-toolkits/py-gnome Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/py-gnome/files patch-ab patch-configure 
                                patch-pygtk::configure 
  Log:
  The x11/libcapplet has been broken for over a year (will be two in June 2011)
  and no one has any of interest to fix it. It's an ancient software and
  is part of GNOME 1. It's time for us to get rid of some of GNOME 1 stuff as
  the GNOME 3 is coming sometimes in 2011. Any ports that required libcappet
  are removed and ports that have optional aren't remove.
  
  PR:             ports/153355
  Discussed with: My team, FreeBSD GNOME Team
  Tested by:      pointyhat-exp (thanks pav!)
